action_set_definitions.name: get_system_time
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current relative simulation time in seconds. Use this to monitor task progress against the 300s deadline.

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the live diagnostic state of a specific robot, including its coordinates, status (IDLE, MOVING, PICKING, ERROR), cargo, and battery.

robot_id.description: The unique identifier of the robot.

action_set_definitions.name: query_inventory_at_location
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves bin information and inventory details at a specific coordinate grid point.

action_set_definitions.name: synchronize_records
action_set_definitions.description: Resolves inconsistencies between the physical environment and the digital management system (e.g., ghost inventory or stuck status flags).

action_set_definitions.name: clear_robot_error
action_set_definitions.description: Sends a hardware reset signal to a robot to clear an ERROR status and return it to IDLE.

action_set_definitions.name: robot_control
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a robot to perform physical actions. Use for movement and payload manipulation.

state_description.robots: A list of active robots in the warehouse, including their current coordinates [x, y], battery level, current status (IDLE, MOVING, PICKING, ERROR), and current cargo.
state_description.inventory_bins: A mapping of bin IDs to their current inventory details, including item_id, quantity, and weight.
state_description.warehouse_grid: Dimensions of the warehouse and a list of static obstacles or restricted zones.
state_description.task_queue: A list of pending retrieval or storage tasks waiting for assignment.
state_description.timestamp: The current relative simulation time in seconds.
